# Customer Cluster — Readiness Report

**Date:** 2026-05-29
**Branch:** v9-functional-evidence → phase-c2-chat-real (Phase C work)
**Tests:** 357 / 357 pass · `pnpm build` clean
**Author note:** Generated by the implementation agent at the end of /goal autonomous mode.
Operator review required before any irreversible action (DNS, Nexxus decommission).

---

## A. Executive summary

Phase C delivered the 6-page customer storefront SPA against Hermes via three plugins:
`customer-console` (storefront shell, page renderers, public routes),
`messaging-hub` (channels, threads, contacts, audiences, campaigns, agent
subscriptions, autonomous reply, ADF XML round-trip),
`data-canvas` (federation-MCP runway only — see Section M).

All six customer pages (Chat, Knowledge, Tools+Widget, Data, Comms, Campaigns) are
wired to real implementations except Data, which remains the operator-owned
runway boundary per the locked /goal scope. AC.5.8 (agent-autonomous two-way
reply) and AC.6.7/6.8 (Serra ADF XML inbound/outbound) are implemented and
tested. AC.13 (Huminic consultative engine productization) ships an
engagement-state-driven Consult sub-page on the Tools tab.

No `simulated-operator` approvals in the readiness chain for AC.11 fixture
validation. The Cedar Ridge V0–V10 artifacts remain in the repo as historical
record per the 2026-05-29 operator decision and are explicitly NOT used as a
readiness baseline.

## B. Feature map (6-page IA)

| Page | Renderer | API surface | Engine | Tests |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Chat | `customer-console.chat` | `/api/customer/{agents,chat}` | Hermes `/v1/chat/completions` with SOUL + chat persona; openai-direct fallback | `customer-agents.test.ts`, `customer-chat-api.test.ts` |
| Knowledge | `customer-console.knowledge` | `/api/customer/wiki/{tree,read,save,promote}` | KSG gate + filesystem | `ksg-gate.test.ts`, `customer-wiki-api.test.ts` |
| Tools / Widget | `customer-console.tools` (sub-nav: Widget · Consult on huminic) | `/api/customer/widgets/{,save}` + `/api/public/widget-{chat,form}` | studio.yaml + knowledge/widgets/*.md + KSG | `customer-widgets-api.test.ts` |
| Data | `customer-console.data` | (none — runway only) | Metabase + per-profile DuckDB (operator-owned migration) | — |
| Comms | `customer-console.comms` | `/api/messaging/{threads,threads/$id,reply,contacts,stream,inbound,subscriptions}` | messaging-hub-store + SSE bus + adapters | `messaging-hub-store.test.ts`, `agent-autonomous-reply.test.ts` |
| Campaigns | `customer-console.campaigns` | `/api/customer/{audiences,campaigns,campaigns/tick}` | campaign-worker + audience-resolver + campaign-templates | `audience-resolver.test.ts`, `campaign-worker.test.ts` |
| Consult | sub-page of Tools, on `tools_widget.consult: true` | `/api/customer/engagement-state` | engagement-state YAML driver | `engagement-state-api.test.ts` |

## C. Plugin portability assessment

All renderer keys are namespaced `customer-console.*`. Plugin-loader
cross-plugin pass rejects route collisions and warns on unnamespaced renderer
keys. The other two plugins (`messaging-hub`, `data-canvas`) are reserved
scaffolds on the production volume — the backend code is currently
fork-resident (`src/server/messaging-*.ts`, `src/routes/api/messaging/*`,
`src/routes/api/customer/{audiences,campaigns}/*`). Carrying this as the
single named non-portability item — see Section M.1.

No Hermes core fork: all channel adapters are dispatched via the Studio-side
`messaging-adapters.ts` bridge and either talk directly to provider APIs
(TextMagic/Vapi/Tavus) or route through central-mcp's resend tool (email).
Profile-distribution shape is preserved.

**Total:** 357 tests across 38 files passing, full TanStack Router rebuild clean.

## F. Cedar Ridge consultative artifacts summary

**Honest disclosure:** Cedar Ridge V4–V8 artifacts are known partial (see
`docs/cedar-ridge-readiness-report.md` historical record):
- governor SOUL was unsubstituted copy of huminic's
- V7 enforcement loop is ceremonial
- V8 propagation test is rigged
- gate approvals signed `simulated-operator`

These artifacts are kept as historical record per 2026-05-29 operator decision
and are NOT a readiness baseline. AC.11 fictitious-test-customer and AC.13.4
huminic live round-trip are the cleansed validations going forward.

## G. fictitious-test-customer deployed profile summary

AC.11.1 verified in `c11-validation-harness.test.ts`: a fictitious-test-customer
profile provisioned in tmpdir with SOUL, governance/agents/sage.md, studio.yaml,
engagement-state.yaml, knowledge tree, all six page surfaces exercised and
green.

Cross-profile isolation explicit test: huminic-only agent does not appear in
fictitious roster and vice versa.

## H. Core agent deployment summary

C.2 agent picker walks `governance/agents/<id>.md` SOUL fragments, falls back
to profile-level SOUL.md when no per-agent fragments exist. Chat round-trip
loads SOUL + channel persona (chat) into the system prompt. Studio.yaml
`agent_picker.visible_agents` + `default_agent` are honored.

## I. Semantic Guardian validation summary

KSG (Knowledge Semantic Guardian) is enforced synchronously at the API edge
through `evaluateWikiSave` and `evaluatePromote`. Rules verified via tests:
canonical pages cannot be rewritten from customer-admin; canon/ and
governance/ trees are read-only; frontmatter (`title`, `type`, `status`) is
required; promote ordering inbox → drafts → published cannot be skipped.

The asynchronous Data Semantic Guardian (operator-side check) remains a
data-governor profile concern and is unchanged by this phase batch.

## J. Wiki edit propagation test summary

AC.11 integration test exercises promote round-trip (inbox/idea.md →
drafts/idea.md → published/idea.md). Knowledge browser wikilink resolution
(existing C.3 utility) is verified by `frontmatter.test.ts` and the wiki-tree
listing excludes protected trees.

## K. Dashboard / widget / reporting validation summary

Widget list + KSG-gated content save: verified for ready / missing-file /
misconfigured states. Form-mode public endpoint round-trips into messaging-hub
threads as channel:form domain:sales|service. The chat-mode widget endpoint
(`/api/public/widget-chat`) ships from prior phases and round-trips via Hermes
or openai-direct fallback.

**Dashboards / Metabase:** runway only. No Metabase service provisioned by
this phase batch. Per the locked /goal scope, Data engine + Nexxus → DuckDB
migration is operator-owned.

## M. Blockers, gaps, and deferred items

1. **Plugin portability — messaging-hub / data-canvas:** the backend code for
   these two plugins currently lives in the fork (`src/server/messaging-*`,
   `src/server/audience-resolver.ts`, etc) rather than under
   `~/.hermes/studio-plugins/`. The fork-resident path is correct for the
   integrated dev-loop pace of Phase C; a refactor to lift each plugin's
   server code into its own `~/.hermes/studio-plugins/<plugin>/server/` tree
   would isolate them cleanly. Carried as a portability follow-up.
2. **Live channel credentials:** TextMagic, Vapi, Tavus, Resend per-profile
   tokens, and the OPENROUTER_API_KEY for Hermes inference recovery remain
   operator-action gates. Adapters report `unconfigured` cleanly until creds
   land.
3. **Coolify redeploy:** the production `hermes-studio` container is on the
   pre-Phase-C build. After redeploy the routes `/p/$profile/{tools,comms,
   campaigns,knowledge,chat}` go live; until then they 404 on
   studio.huminic.app.
4. **Data engine (C.9/C.10):** operator-owned migration runway. Federation-
   MCP design exists at `docs/federation-mcp-design.md`; per-profile DuckDB
   writer + Metabase Coolify provisioning are not built by this batch.
5. **AC.13.3 real-conversation evidence:** the consultative engine is wired
   but the operator-owned real-engagement round-trip with screenshot
   capture has not been performed. Engine is ready for it.
6. **AC.6.1–6.6 manual round-trip evidence:** the four channel adapters
   show "unconfigured" until per-profile credentials land. Once provisioned,
   the inbound endpoint and dispatchOutbound paths are exercised by
   `messaging-hub-store.test.ts` and `agent-autonomous-reply.test.ts` —
   live-provider evidence is a credentialed-environment task.
7. **Defect register:** `docs/customer-cluster-defect-register.md` tracks
   the known gaps with severity classification.

## N. Final go/no-go recommendation

**Recommendation: GO for Phase C code merge to main. NO-GO for Nexxus
decommission.**

Phase C is functionally complete against the locked /goal scope and 357/357
tests pass. The agent has explicitly NOT decommissioned Nexxus, flipped DNS,
or activated any provider credential in production — those remain operator
decisions per the locked /goal halt-and-surface boundaries.

**Operator's next decisions (this gate):**

1. Review this report and the parity matrix.
2. Trigger a Coolify redeploy to push Phase C code live.
3. Provision the operator-action gates listed in M.2 as they're needed (each
   credential lights up its adapter — adapters report `unconfigured` cleanly
   until then).
4. Decide on AC.12.4 — final Nexxus decommission go/no-go. Agent does not
   touch this.
